methods.name: Construction Quote Email Classifier
methods.description: Classifies one incoming construction email into a type for an estimator's inbox: a supplier quote, a supplier asking questions before quoting, other job-related mail, unrelated, or spam.

methods.name: Note Tidier
methods.description: Turn a messy note into a clean title and a few bullet points.

routines.name: Tidy Notes
routines.description: Paste a messy note; get back a clean title and bullet points you can keep and revisit.
